creator: luislupe@gmail.com
text:
For a FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p7 system, pkg 1.18.3

I tried to do a pkg upgrade, after some weeks of no upgrades, and the package grantleetheme-22.04.3 generates an error.

The extraction is done 100%.
but pkg reports:
pkg: Fail to create temporary file: /usr/local/include/KF5/GrantleeTheme/GrantleeTheme/.pkgtemp.GenericFormatter.Cd2dH1f5r2iy:Not a directory

Indeed, /usr/local/include/KF5/GrantleeTheme/GrantleeTheme is a 41 bytes file, whose contents are '#include "grantleetheme/grantleetheme.h"

Because of this, I cannot login to KDE and be able to use the desktop.
